elections.note: Certified final = 669,627 ballots (Election Day 298,112 + VBM 371,515) from CA SoS 2012 Voter Participation Statistics by County, primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: Riverside's Sequoia 'eresults' live page (voteinfo.net/Elections/20121106/eresults/) was not archived on/near election night, and Riverside used no Dominion ElectionSummaryReport before 2019. WebFetch blocked; curl+CDX+headless-Chrome used. Re-verified 2026-06: Riverside's /Elections/<date>/docs/ press-release archive holds only operational releases (candidate filing, VBM, early voting, certification) -- there is NO morning-after 'semi-official results' release stating an election-night total -- so SKILL route-1 (registrar semi-final release) is a dead end for this county across all years; plateau remains unsourceable. DEAD-END NOTE EXTENSION (2026-07-09, Task 9): checked whether Riverside's elections CMS (voteinfo.net / livevoterturnout.com) runs CivicPlus DocumentCenter (the module that yields guessable sequential report IDs for Nevada and Napa counties) -- it does not (CDX prefix probe of www.rivco.org/DocumentCenter: 0 captures), so no ID-walk was possible. Checked the brief's named registrar Twitter handle @RivCoVote via Wayback CDX (exact URL and matchType=prefix, unrestricted date range): zero captures under any form; a small set of plausible alternate handles (RivCoElections, VoteRiverside, RiversideVotes) also returned zero. No Facebook page candidate for Riverside's registrar was found either. No new route found; row remains as documented above.

Certified final = 357,764 ballots (Election Day 124,829 + VBM 232,935) from CA SoS 2014 complete Statement of Vote, Voter Participation Statistics page, primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: the only Wayback capture of the eresults page is 2014-11-20 (post-certification canvass), no election-night-stage snapshot. Re-verified 2026-06: Riverside's /Elections/20141104/docs/ press-release archive contains only operational releases (no morning-after 'semi-official results' release stating an election-night total), so the registrar-release route yields nothing either; plateau remains unsourceable. DEAD-END NOTE EXTENSION (2026-07-09, Task 9): checked whether Riverside's elections CMS (voteinfo.net / livevoterturnout.com) runs CivicPlus DocumentCenter (the module that yields guessable sequential report IDs for Nevada and Napa counties) -- it does not (CDX prefix probe of www.rivco.org/DocumentCenter: 0 captures), so no ID-walk was possible. No Facebook page candidate for Riverside's registrar was found either. No new route found; row remains as documented above.

Certified final = 769,193 ballots (Election Day 264,638 + VBM 504,555) from CA SoS 2016 Voter Participation Statistics by County, primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: earliest Wayback capture of the Sequoia eresults page is 2016-11-10 (Election Result.htm frameset), and the detail page (Election Result_dtl.htm, captured 2016-11-12) is locked to 'Last Updated November 11, 2016 4:54 PM' showing 532,023 ballots (202,100 Election-Day + 329,923 VBM) -- a 3-day-post canvass update, NOT the election-night plateau. No election-night-stage (Nov 8-9) snapshot exists in Wayback. Re-verified 2026-06: Riverside's /Elections/20161108/docs/ press-release archive lists releases through 20161107 (cast-your-ballot) and then jumps to 20161207 (certification) -- no morning-after 'semi-official results' release stating an election-night total. snapshots inspected 20161110234008 / 20161112032234. DEAD-END NOTE EXTENSION (2026-07-09, Task 9): checked whether Riverside's elections CMS (voteinfo.net / livevoterturnout.com) runs CivicPlus DocumentCenter (the module that yields guessable sequential report IDs for Nevada and Napa counties) -- it does not (CDX prefix probe of www.rivco.org/DocumentCenter: 0 captures), so no ID-walk was possible. No Facebook page candidate for Riverside's registrar was found either. No new route found; row remains as documented above.

Certified final = 650,545 ballots (Election Day 194,606 + VBM 455,939) from CA SoS 2018 Voter Participation Statistics by County; corroborated by Riverside Summary_Final.pdf (Run Date/Time 12/7/18). Primary. Election-night plateau not sourceable: earliest Wayback capture of the eresults page is 2018-11-28 (post-certification); no election-night-stage snapshot exists. Re-verified 2026-06: Riverside's /Elections/20181106/docs/ press-release archive runs candidate-filing -> VBM -> early-voting -> 20181105_Release_Encouraged and 20181106_QualWriteInResults, then certification -- NO morning-after 'semi-official results' release stating an election-night total; plateau remains unsourceable. DEAD-END NOTE EXTENSION (2026-07-09, Task 9): checked whether Riverside's elections CMS (voteinfo.net / livevoterturnout.com) runs CivicPlus DocumentCenter (the module that yields guessable sequential report IDs for Nevada and Napa counties) -- it does not (CDX prefix probe of www.rivco.org/DocumentCenter: 0 captures), so no ID-walk was possible. Election-night plateau = 205,813 ballots ('Voters Cast: 205,813 of 1,310,928 (15.70%)'; Governor Times Cast 205,813) from the official Riverside Dominion EMS 'Semi-Official Election Results' report, Last-Modified 11/09/2022 02:04 PST (the ~2 a.m. final election-night report, within the hourly-until-3am window). This held as the live page until the first canvass update (300,498, Last-Modified 11/11/2022) -- i.e. it plateaued through the next day before the multi-day canvass resumed, matching the metric. Corroborated by Idyllwild Town Crier (Nov 9, 2022): election-night counting complete at ~205,000 with ~335,000 ballots remaining. 205,813/604,617 = 34.0%. Certified final 604,617 (Election Day 59,812 + VBM 544,805) from CA SoS, primary. snapshot 20221109110809 used. First epollbook general.

elections.flag: election-night-stage mismatch: 611,101 is the Nov-6 17:35 first daily canvass update, NOT the ~3 a.m. election-night plateau (which is unarchived); it overstates the true plateau and is not stage-comparable to the clean 2022 2 a.m. figure -- exclude from the pre/post epollbook comparison.
elections.note: 611,101 'Ballots Counted' from the earliest Wayback capture of Riverside's livevoterturnout ENR, embedded timestamp 'Updated: 11/6/2024 5:35:21 PM' -- the FIRST daily canvass update (afternoon of the day after the Nov 5 election), NOT the ~3 a.m. election-night plateau. Riverside reports hourly until ~3 a.m. (confirmed by the registrar's own 'November 5 Election Night Results Reporting' release, rivco.org, dated Nov 4, 2024: 'results will continue to be uploaded every hour until approximately 3 a.m.') then updates daily (excl. Sundays). 611,101/959,098 = 63.7% slightly OVER-states the election-night share and is NOT strictly stage-comparable to the clean 2 a.m. 2022 figure. Next captures: 685,126 (11/9), 912,011 (11/15). Certified final 959,098 (Election Day 170,437 + VBM 788,661) from CA SoS, primary. snapshot 20241107034053 used. Post-epollbook, pre-ASV. Re-verified 2026-06: the only Wayback ENR captures are 20241107034053 (the 11/6 17:35 update shown above) and 20241109 -- there is NO capture in the poll-close-to-3 a.m. window; Riverside posted no 2024 Dominion EMS ElectionSummaryReport to voteinfo.net/Elections/20241105/docs/ (none archived), issued no morning-after 'semi-official results' release stating an election-night total, and local news (Riverside Record, Raincross Gazette) state precincts-reporting but no countywide election-night ballot count. The ~3 a.m. plateau is therefore genuinely unarchived; 611,101 is retained as the nearest datapoint (an upper bound) and flagged not-comparable per comparable:false above.
